ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Subject ID of the patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Hospital ID where the patient is being treated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for each patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the hospital */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the hospital was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "icd9_code" INTEGER /* ICD9 code for the diagnosis */,
  "seq_num" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_time" TEXT /* Time of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosing_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who made the diagnosis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission associated with the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_icd9_code FOREIGN KEY ("icd9_code") REFERENCES icd9_codes ("icd9_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icd9_codes" (
  "icd9_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICD9 code */,
  "icd9_code" INTEGER /* ICD9 code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ICD9 code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ICD9 code */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the ICD9 code */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the ICD9 code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icd9_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being admitted */,
  "hadm_id" INTEGER /* HADM ID for the admission */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "admission_type" TEXT /* Type of admission (e.g., emergency, elective) */,
  "admission_source" TEXT /* Source of the admission (e.g., referral, self-referral) */,
  "discharge_disposition" TEXT /* Disposition at discharge (e.g., home, transfer to another facility) */,
  "attending_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attending physician */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the patient was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
column_names: Hospital ID where the patient is being treated
Date of birth of the patient
Phone number of the emergency contact
Unique medical record number for each patient
Contact email for inquiries about the hospital
Contact phone number for the hospital
ID of the patient being diagnosed

Any additional notes or comments about the diagnosis
ID of the admission associated with the diagnosis

More detailed description of the ICD9 code
ID of the patient being admitted
Source of the admission (e.g., referral, self-referral)
Disposition at discharge (e.g., home, transfer to another facility)
